notes: Solid Tetris implementation with DAS/ARR, ghost piece, bag randomizer, lock delay, and audio; minor issue with lock delay accumulation logic (adds dropCounter instead of dt) but overall very playable.
An excellent, fully functional Tetris clone with ghost pieces, 7-bag randomizer, DAS/ARR handling, and audio.

Solid playable Tetris with scoring, next preview, ghost piece, and line clears, but rotation/kick logic is simplistic, controls have a likely Space key bug due to using e.code==='Space' in preventDefault, and it is not close to flawless guideline-accurate Tetris behavior.
